title: bo_review record
description: An LLM Reviewer's SURROGATE valuation of ONE candidate research move (opportunity/idea/follow-up), for the DeepScientist-inspired idea-level BO loop. The reviewer is a configurable independent role (default backend=codex, effort=max); its output is a structured valuation vector, NOT proof and NOT a gate. record_id = review_id; append-only (insert). QUEST-LOCAL ONLY: context_refs cite rows of THIS quest; there is no cross-quest/global/sibling recall. is_stub=1 marks a deterministic OFFLINE stub valuation (tests/advisory), not a real reviewer call.

quest_id.description: owning quest; REQUIRED — reviews are quest-local

candidate_ref.description: the reviewed candidate's durable ref (e.g. an opportunity_id / idea_select select_id / frontier candidate_ref)

reviewer_backend.description: codex|claude|gemini|local|custom|stub — the backend that produced this valuation

is_stub.description: true = deterministic OFFLINE stub (tests/advisory), NOT a real reviewer backend call

context_refs.description: quest-local context the reviewer saw, e.g. {scope_contract, idea_select, finding:[...], result:[...], claim:[...], reference:[...]}; ids must belong to THIS quest (no cross-quest refs).

valuation.description: structured valuation vector. The 8 score dimensions are 0-100 integers/floats; names are STABLE and documented.

utility.description: expected research value / impact toward the objective

novelty.description: distinctness from prior work and other candidates

exploration_value.description: information gain / how much it reduces open uncertainty

uncertainty.description: reviewer's uncertainty about the outcome (drives the UCB exploration term)

feasibility.description: how implementable within this quest's repo/compute/protocol

expected_metric_direction.description: improve|regress|neutral|unknown — expected effect on the primary metric (descriptor; not scored)

expected_effect.description: OPTIONAL normalised expected effect magnitude (0-100; default treated as 50 if absent)

rationale.description: why these scores, grounded in this quest's evidence

risks.description: explicit risks / blockers the reviewer flagged
